title: New Game
overview: Takuto wakes in a fantasy world with his Hero, Atou, and the use of game mechanics from a 4X strategy game.

title: Let's Announce the Founding of Mynoghra
overview: Takuto uses the Refugee system to welcome the dark elves into his nation, and learns of two good nations nearby.

title: The Time for Domestic Affairs has Come
overview: Takuto focuses on solidifying the foundation of his civilization, setting policies, and watching his home grow.

title: Life Doesn't Always Go Your Way
overview: The paladins from Qualia fight their way south and finally reach the Accursed Lands to face Atou.

title: I’m the Monster You’ve Been Looking For
overview: Atou engages the Paladins in combat and learns several key details about the world her and Takuto now inhabit.

title: King, Are You an Evil Person?
overview: Atou recruits little girls to care for Takuto. He helps them face their survivor's guilt over eating their mom

title: Please Be My Friend!
overview: Forngawn's Staff Holders visit Mynoghra, the sociable Pepe defusing tensions and forging an alliance.

title: What a Human thing to do!
overview: The twins go to Dragontan with the human-obsessed Medic units to observe its culture. They befriend the mayor.

title: It’s Well Past Your Bedtime
overview: Atou heads to Dragontan while Isla goes around mothering everyone and doling out headpats.

title: Go Forth and Conquer
overview: The enemy proves to be a JRPG! Atou then fights foes operating under completely different game mechanics!

title: Let's Launch Our Counterattack
overview: Takuto empowers Isla and she faces down one of the Four Generals and his army by herself.

title: The Moon is Pretty, Isn’t It?
Then the Game of the Gods Begins
overview: In the wake of their battle, hints of new foes and a greater conspiracy emerges as Mynoghra sets its new goal.
